title: First Words
description: Greet people, say yes/no, thank them — the words you will use every single day.

title: Meeting People
description: Introduce yourself, ask names, say where you're from. Start a real conversation.

title: Food & Drink
description: Order at a restaurant, talk about what you like, and survive a Kerala sadya.

title: Getting Around
description: Take an auto, ask for directions, find the bus stop, and not get lost.

title: Shopping & Numbers
description: Count to 100, bargain at the market, and pay without confusion.

title: Home & Family
description: Talk about your family, your home, and daily routines.

title: Time & Weather
description: Tell the time, talk about days, and comment on Kerala's famous rain.

title: Feelings & Health
description: Express how you feel, describe symptoms, and ask for help at a pharmacy.

title: Phone & Social
description: Make plans, give your number, chat casually, and be polite on calls.

title: Emergency & Essentials
description: Ask for urgent help, find a hospital, report a problem — the phrases you hope you won't need.
